name: reviewer
description: Reviews code changes for quality and correctness.
denialHint: Reviewer role can only edit own workspace.

constraints.message: Agent {agent} was code-writer on task '{task}' and cannot be reviewer on the same task. Dispatch to a different agent for review.

Reviewers can only dispatch a code-writer when dispatched by a code-writer. Report findings back to your dispatcher instead.
  dydo msg --to {dispatcher} --subject {task} --body "Review findings: ..."
